headline: Mastercard’s (NYSE:MA) Q1 CY2026 Sales Beat Estimates
summary: Global payments technology company Mastercard (NYSE:MA) beat Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 15.8% year on year to $8.40 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $4.60 per share was 4.2% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Mastercard Beats Earnings Estimates. Why the Stock Is Falling.
summary: Mastercard  stock fell Thursday after the card provider reported better-than-expected quarterly earnings.  The company posted adjusted earnings of $4.60 a share for the first quarter, up from $3.73 a year ago and above analysts’ consensus estimate of $4.41, according to FactSet.  Mastercard boosted the high end of its outlook for 2026 revenue growth.

content.title: Mastercard Beats Earnings Estimates. Why the Stock Is Falling.

The company posted adjusted earnings of $4.60 a share for the first quarter, up from $3.73 a year ago and above analysts’ consensus estimate of $4.41, according to FactSet.  Mastercard boosted the high end of its outlook for 2026 revenue growth.
